name: Baked Asparagus Cheese Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 18 slices Swiss cheese (3 packages, 8 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut asparagus spears in half.
2. Arrange 6 slices of bread on the bottom of a slightly greased 13 x 9-inch baking dish.
3. Place cheese slices on each slice of bread (fold if cut from a long package).
4. Put one asparagus spear on each slice of cheese, followed by another slice of bread, another slice of cheese, and four asparagus tips.
5. Top with the final slice of cheese.
6. In a bowl, beat eggs until light; add remaining ingredients.
7. Pour egg mixture over sandwiches and refrigerate for 1 hour.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes, or until golden brown. Makes 6 servings.
